articles.title: Here's how much the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold8, Z Flip8 foldables will cost in South Korea - GSMArena.com news - GSMArena.com
articles.description: The foldables are expected to be announced later this month. Last week, the European pricing for Samsung's upcoming Galaxy Z foldables surfaced online....
articles.content: Last week, the European pricing for Samsung's upcoming Galaxy Z foldables surfaced online. Now, a new report from South Korea has revealed the expected prices of the Galaxy Z Fold8, Z Fold8 Ultra, an… [+909 chars]
